title: XGenGuardian Brand Registry
description: Schema for tools/brand-seeder/brands.yaml. Validated in CI on every change. See docs/runbooks/brand-registry.md.

brands.description: Ordered list of brand definitions seeded into the Brand Registry.

brand.description: A single brand monitored for impersonation.

name.description: Human-readable brand name used as the primary key in the brands table.

canonical_domains.description: Domains the brand legitimately owns. Used for impersonation detection.

login_urls.description: Seed URLs for the sandbox-render screenshotter.

keywords.description: Keywords for fuzzy domain matching (brand typo-squatting detection).

expected_issuer.description: Expected TLS certificate issuer CA short-name (e.g. DigiCert, Let's Encrypt). Used in mis-issuance signal.

legitimate_asns.description: ASNs legitimately used by this brand. Any hosting outside these triggers an infra-mismatch signal.

legitimate_issuers.description: Alternative form of issuer allow-list (multi-issuer brands).

manual_screenshots.description: Fallback screenshots for pages that block headless rendering.

manual_screenshot.description: A manually captured screenshot used when auto-rendering fails.

page_label.description: Logical page label matching label_of() in seed.py (login | home | checkout).

page_url.description: Canonical URL of the page the screenshot represents.

file.description: Relative path from brands.yaml to the PNG file (e.g. manual/paypal-login.png).

screenshot_url.description: Optional remote URL if the screenshot is hosted (e.g. in MinIO).
